rows.description: Arrearagia a 2^d Die Nov. 1781 ad eundem diem Nov. 1782.
rows.notes: Based on gemini-flash's description, corrected '2d' to '2^d' for superscript from visual inspection. Both extractors agreed on row type and empty amounts. The description provided by gemini-flash was closer to the image, specifically '2d' and 'die'.
rows.section_header: Arrearagia a 2^d Die Nov. 1781 ad eundem diem Nov. 1782.

rows.notes: Based on gpt-5-mini's more accurate reading of 'Recepte' from the image, correcting to 'Recepte-' to include the dash. Both extractors agreed on row type and empty amounts. gpt-5-mini's note about it being a 'left-margin label' is accurate.

Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '30: 0: 0.' on the left of the ledger, matching the right-hand amount '30 0 0'. Visual confirmation.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment from Gwincar rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment from Gwincar rectory, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately reads 'Anns' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini read 'Anno'. Amounts '11 17 1' are clear.
rows.english_description: Annual rent due from the Kidlington mills.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent due from the Kidlington mills, amounting to £11 17s 1d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately reads 'Morton' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini read 'Merton'. Amounts '5 8 0' are clear.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Morton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Morton, amounting to £5 8s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '49: 14: 0.' on the left of the ledger, matching the right-hand amount '49 14 0'. Visual confirmation.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of South Newington, amounting to £49 14s 0d.

rows.description: 5: 18: 11. Garsington Edw. Sadler pro An. (Bucket the same)
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Combined descriptions: gemini-flash correctly extracted the embedded amount and core description; gpt-5-mini correctly included '(Bucket the same)' which is present on the same line in the image. Visual confirmation for all elements.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Garsington paid by Edward Sadler (note: 'Bucket the same' noted in parenthesis).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Garsington paid by Edward Sadler, amounting to £5 18s 11d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '5: 18: 11.' on the left of the ledger, matching the right-hand amount '5 18 11'. Visual confirmation indicates amounts are clearly legible despite gpt-5-mini's concerns about faintness.
rows.english_description: Payment from Garsington paid by John Prickett, likely an annual rent.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Garsington paid by John Prickett, amounting to £5 18s 11d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '3: 6: 3.' and 'Tenm^t.' with a clear superscript 't' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini read 'Tenmt.'.
rows.english_description: Biennial payment from a tenant at South Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial payment from a tenant at South Newington, amounting to £3 6s 3d.

rows.notes: Amounts for pounds, shillings, and pence agreed, but fraction differed. Selected gemini-flash's output based on visual inspection, which clearly shows 'Fentinhol' (not 'Tintinhull') and the fraction '¼' (0.25) both in the embedded description and the final amount column. gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified the fraction as '½' (0.5).
rows.english_description: Biennial payment from Fentinhol made by Napier.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial payment from Fentinhol made by Napier, amounting to £9 2s 7.25d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Manually corrected description punctuation to 'Quinquen:-' from visual inspection, as both extractors had minor discrepancies (colon vs period) and missed the trailing dash. Amounts '3 17 1' are clear.
rows.english_description: Quinquennial payment from Holwell (for a five-year period).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Quinquennial payment from Holwell, amounting to £3 17s 1d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '30: 3: 4.' on the left of the ledger, matching the right-hand amount '30 3 4'. Visual confirmation.
rows.english_description: Quadrennial payment from the Chace Hill estate (four-year payment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Quadrennial payment from the Chace Hill estate, amounting to £30 3s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '6: 15: 3.'. Corrected description to include the double period '..' at the end of 'Dimid.' based on visual inspection. Amounts '6 15 3' are clear.
rows.english_description: Payment from Bensington covering one year and a half.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Bensington covering one year and a half, amounting to £6 15s 3d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Manually corrected description punctuation to 'Quinquen:--' from visual inspection, as both extractors had minor discrepancies and missed the trailing dashes. Amounts '2 10 0' are clear.
rows.english_description: Quinquennial payment from Montacute (for five years).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Quinquennial payment from Montacute, amounting to £2 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '1: 0: 0.' on the left of the ledger, matching the right-hand amount '1 0 0'. Visual confirmation.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Bampton, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.description: (Stev. Comyns Esq^. pro Bien et Dimid.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the opening parenthesis and the superscript 't' in 'Esq^.' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini missed the parenthesis and superscript. Amounts '23 6 8' are clear.
rows.english_description: Payment from Stephen Comyns Esquire covering two years and a half (biennium and a half).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Stephen Comyns Esquire covering two years and a half, amounting to £23 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately reads 'Jonathan' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini read 'Donathan'. Amounts '13 6 8' are clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial payment from Comyns and Jonathan (formerly Hanforths), amounting to £13 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors on description, amounts, and type. No discrepancies found.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately reads 'W^m' with the superscript 'm' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini read 'Wm.'. Amounts '1 18 0' are clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from William Hall, amounting to £1 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms the description '0: 10: 0. Jesus Coll. pro An.' on the left and the amount '0 10 0' on the right. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the amount column as '0 40 0' and then converted it; however, the shillings column is clearly '10', not '40'.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Jesus College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Jesus College, amounting to £0 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gpt-5-mini's description 'Tretherwin' which is a more accurate visual reading than gemini-flash's 'Grethenson'. The 'T' and 'w' are clearly visible in the image. Amounts '3 0 0' are clear.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment from Tretherwin.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment from Tretherwin, amounting to £3 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the embedded amount '6: 10: 0.' on the left. gemini-flash's note highlighting the discrepancy between the embedded amount and the final amount '20 0 0' on the right is insightful and reflects careful observation of ledger patterns.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Quadrennial annuity payment from Thrupp, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.english_description: Annual payment from Hedenham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Hedenham, amounting to £6 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and fraction. Using gemini-flash's description which accurately includes the '£' symbol in '150£: 17: 10½' from visual inspection. gpt-5-mini omitted the '£' symbol. The total is clearly legible.
